headline: EU weighs freezing Russian oil price cap as Middle East war lifts crude prices
summary: Investing.com -- The European Union is considering temporarily freezing its price cap on Russian oil as the conflict in the Middle East continues to drive higher energy prices, according to a Bloomberg report on Sunday.
